content_en:
Abu Hurairah # related that he heard the Prophet 2% say, “Whoever has camels for which he doesn’t give their due right in their hardship and their ease, then they will come on the Day of Resurrection the most Aglzar they ever were, the most in number, the fattest they ever were, and the most Asar (providing happiness) they ever were (i.e. this all means they will be in very good shape). He will be thrown on his face on a level, smooth land, and they will trample him with their feet. When the last of them goes by him, the first one will be brought back for him, on a day whose measurement is 50,000 years. This will continue until (Allah) rules between the people. Then he will see his destination. And if he had cows for which he did not pay their due tight (ie. Zakaat) in their hardship and ease, then they will come on the Day of Resurrection more fast and active than they ever were; bigger than ever before; fatter than ever before; more Asar (providing happiness) than ever before; more in number than ever before; and more Anshar than ever before. Then he will be thrown on his face on a level, smooth land. Every possessor of Dhilf (feet of a cow, sheep, or deer) will trample him and every possessor of a horn will butt him. When the last of them passes by him, the first one will be brought back for him, on a day whose measurement is 50,000 years. This will continue until (Allah) judges between the people, and then he will see his destination.” (Ahmad) Al-Baihaqee said, “This can only mean that that Day is calculated to be 50,000 years from the years you count.” And Allah 48 knows best.

312 Book of The End: Great ‘Trials and Tribulations

For Sinners, The Day Of Resurrection Is Long And Difficult; For The People Of taqwa (Piety, Righteousness, Etc.), It Is Neither Long Nor Difficult

It will only be long and difficult for one who is not forgiven. As for those believers who are forgiven, Abu ‘Abdullah Al-Haafiz related that Abu Hurairah said, “For the believers, the Day of Resurrection is like the period between Az-Zuhr and Al-‘Asr.” He then said, “This is what is memorized (ic. by the trustworthy ones).”

The same has been related in a narration that is ascribed to the Prophet i it is related by Abu ‘Abdullah Al-Haafidh through Ibn Al-Mubaarak.

Ya'qoob ibn Sufyaan related that ‘Abdullah ibn ‘Umar ts said, “The Messenger of Allah #8 recited this Verse:

LA wey ay BAe or RGN So EN Oe

“The Day when (all) mankind will stand before the Lord of the

and the people of Paradise will take their day nap in Paradise). He then recited:

“Then, thereafter, verily, their return is to the flaming fire of Hell.”

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 313

Ibn Al-Mubaarak said, “This is the recitation of Ibn Mas’ood 4 for this verse (whereas the well-known recitation is ‘Then thereafter, verily, their return is to the flaming fire of Hell’).” (Related by Abu Bakr ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa)

Oo peehe SLE eb Be nye ae ae ot “The dwellers of Paradise (i.e. those who deserved it through their faith and righteousness) will, on that Day, have the best abode, and have the fairest of places for repose,“"1l

‘Abdullah ibn Mas’ood 4 said, “Half of the day will not pass on the

Day of Resurrection until both of these take their repose (people of

Hell in Hell, people of Paradise in Paradise).” (Related by Abu Bakr

314 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

THE STATION OF PRAISE AND GLORY

Among The Rest Of The Prophets, Is Specific To The Messenger Of Allah #%; Part Of That Is The Greater Intercession For The People Of The Mawgif, So That The Lord ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him Belongs Might And Majesty) Comes And Rules Between Them. Then The Believers Are Given Comfort From That Situation And Are Headed To A Most Blessed Destination

“And in some parts of the night (also) offer the salah (prayer) with

it (ie. recite the Qur’an in the prayer), as an additional prayer

(Tahajjiud optional prayer - Naweafil) for you (O Muhammad #8). It

may be that your Lord will raise you to Magaman Mahmuda (a

station of praise and glory, i.e. the highest degree in Paradise’), Jaabir ibn ‘Abdullah 4 reported that the Messenger of Allah #8 said, “Whosoever says upon hearing the call (to prayer), ‘O Allah, Owner of this perfect call and Owner of this prayer to be performed, bestow upon Muhammad Al-Waseelah (a station in Paradise) and AlFadeelah (a rank above the rest of creation) and raise him upon a station of praise and glory, which You have promised him. Verily, You never fail in Your promise,’ then my intercession is permissible for him on the Day of Resurrection.” (Bukhaaree)

The Intercession Is The Station Of Praise And Glory

Abu Hurairah # related that the Prophet 2% said, “ ‘It may be that your Lord will raise you to Maqaman Mahmuda (a station of praise and glory).”” He #8 said, “The intercession.” (Ahmad)

The Messenger # was given five matters that no other Prophet or

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 315

Messenger #% was given. Jaabir # — and others — related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “I have been given five (matters) that were not given to any Prophet before me: I have been made victorious with terror for the distance of a month (i.e. those who are one month’s traveling distance from him, in terms of his enemies, are terrified to do battle with him); spoils of war have been made lawful for me, whereas they were not made lawful for anyone before me; the earth was made as a Masjid for me and (it was made) pure (for me and my nation), so if prayer arrives for any man from my Nation, then let him pray (wherever he happens to be); I have been given the intercession; and whereas a Prophet would be sent to his people, I have been sent to the people in general.” (Bukhaaree and Muslim)

When the Prophet #% said, “I have been given the intercession,” he #€ was referring to the intercession that will be requested from Adam si, who will say, “I am not the one for that, go to Noah.” Noah, ss8\ will say the same to them, and will guide them to Tbraaheem #4, who will refer them to Moosa 3&!, who will refer them to ‘Eesa 8681. Then “Eesa #84 will refer them to Muhammad #3, who will say, “I am for it, 1 am for it.” We will discuss this in more detail when we relate Ahaadeeth about intercession, intercession for the sinners to be taken out from the Hellfire.

On The Day Of Resurrection, The Messenger 2 Will Be The Chief Of The Children Of Adam #21

The Messenger # Is The Imam Of The Prophets On The Day Of Resurrection

At-Tufail ibn Abee Ka’ab related from his father # that the Prophet #8 said, “On the Day of Resurrection, I will be the Imam of the

316 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

Prophets, their Khateeb (orator), and the possessor of their intercession — all without Fakhr (pride or haughtiness).” (Ahmad) At-Tirmidhee and Ibn Maajah both related it from ‘Abdullah ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Ugail. And At-Tirmidhee said, “Hasan sahih.”’

An-Nadr ibn Anas related that the Prophet #¥ said, “I will be standing, waiting for my nation after the Siraat. ‘Eesa 2% will come to me and say, ‘These are the Prophets who have come to you, O Muhammad; they have to ask you,” or he 2 said, ‘they will gather to you. They are supplicating to Allah to separate between all of the nation to wherever Allah wishes.’ “The creation is bridled in sweat. As for the believer, it is wpon him like the cold. As for the disbeliever, death will envelop him in it.” The Prophet #¢ will then say to “esa 4s, ‘Wait until I return to you.’ He # then goes to underneath the Throne. He will meet with that which no chosen angel ever met with, nor any sent Prophet. Allah will then inspire Jibreel to go to Muhammad and say, ‘Raise your head; ask, you will be given; intercede, and your intercession will be accepted.” The Prophet #4 then said, “Then I will intercede for my nation, and I will
content_id:
Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa ia mendengar Nabi 2% bersabda, "Barangsiapa memiliki unta namun tidak menunaikan haknya di masa kesulitan maupun kemudahan, maka unta-unta itu akan datang pada Hari Kebangkitan dalam kondisi paling Aglzar yang pernah ada, paling banyak jumlahnya, paling gemuk yang pernah ada, dan paling Asar (memberikan kesenangan) yang pernah ada (yakni semuanya dalam kondisi sangat prima). Ia akan dilemparkan dengan wajahnya di atas tanah yang rata dan datar, lalu unta-unta itu menginjaknya dengan kaki-kaki mereka. Ketika yang terakhir dari mereka melewatinya, yang pertama akan dikembalikan padanya, pada hari yang ukurannya adalah 50.000 tahun. Hal ini terus berlanjut hingga (Allah) memutuskan perkara di antara manusia. Kemudian ia akan melihat tempat tujuannya. Dan jika ia memiliki sapi namun tidak membayar hak mereka yang semestinya (yakni Zakaat) di masa kesulitan maupun kemudahan, maka sapi-sapi itu akan datang pada Hari Kebangkitan lebih lincah dan aktif dari sebelumnya; lebih besar dari sebelumnya; lebih gemuk dari sebelumnya; lebih Asar (memberikan kesenangan) dari sebelumnya; lebih banyak dari sebelumnya; dan lebih Anshar dari sebelumnya. Kemudian ia akan dilemparkan dengan wajahnya di atas tanah yang rata dan datar. Setiap pemilik Dhilf (kaki sapi, domba, atau rusa) akan menginjaknya dan setiap pemilik tanduk akan menanduknya. Ketika yang terakhir dari mereka melewatinya, yang pertama akan dikembalikan padanya, pada hari yang ukurannya adalah 50.000 tahun. Hal ini terus berlanjut hingga (Allah) memutuskan perkara di antara manusia, kemudian ia akan melihat tempat tujuannya." (Ahmad) Al-Baihaqee berkata, "Ini hanya bisa berarti bahwa Hari itu dihitung selama 50.000 tahun dari tahun-tahun yang kalian hitung." Dan Allah 48 Maha Mengetahui.

312 Book of The End: Great 'Trials and Tribulations

Bagi Orang-Orang Berdosa, Hari Kebangkitan Panjang Dan Menyulitkan; Bagi Orang-Orang Yang Bertaqwa (Saleh, Benar, Dan Sebagainya), Ia Tidak Panjang Maupun Menyulitkan

Hari itu hanya akan panjang dan menyulitkan bagi mereka yang tidak diampuni. Adapun bagi orang-orang beriman yang diampuni, Abu 'Abdullah Al-Haafiz meriwayatkan bahwa Abu Hurairah berkata, "Bagi orang-orang beriman, Hari Kebangkitan seperti waktu antara Az-Zuhr dan Al-'Asr." Ia kemudian berkata, "Inilah yang dihafal (yakni oleh orang-orang yang terpercaya)."

Hal yang sama telah diriwayatkan dalam sebuah narasi yang dinisbatkan kepada Nabi; diriwayatkan oleh Abu 'Abdullah Al-Haafidh melalui Ibn Al-Mubaarak.

Ya'qoob ibn Sufyaan meriwayatkan bahwa 'Abdullah ibn 'Umar berkata, "Rasulullah #8 membaca ayat ini:

LA wey ay BAe or RGN So EN Oe

"Hari ketika (semua) manusia akan berdiri di hadapan Rabb semesta alam

dan penduduk Surga akan beristirahat siang di Surga). Kemudian beliau membaca:

"Kemudian sesungguhnya tempat kembali mereka adalah ke neraka yang menyala-nyala."

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 313

Ibn Al-Mubaarak berkata, "Inilah bacaan Ibn Mas'ood 4 untuk ayat ini (sedangkan bacaan yang masyhur adalah 'Kemudian sesungguhnya tempat kembali mereka adalah ke neraka yang menyala-nyala')." (Diriwayatkan oleh Abu Bakr ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa)

Oo peehe SLE eb Be nye ae ae ot "Penghuni Surga (yakni mereka yang berhak mendapatkannya melalui iman dan amal saleh mereka) akan, pada Hari itu, memiliki tempat tinggal terbaik, dan tempat istirahat yang paling indah,""1l

'Abdullah ibn Mas'ood 4 berkata, "Separuh hari tidak akan berlalu pada Hari Kebangkitan hingga keduanya beristirahat (penduduk Neraka di Neraka, penduduk Surga di Surga)." (Diriwayatkan oleh Abu Bakr

314 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

MAQAM TERPUJI DAN MULIA

Di Antara Para Nabi Lainnya, Ini Khusus Bagi Rasulullah #%; Sebagian Darinya Adalah Syafaat Agung Bagi Penduduk Mawqif, Agar Rabb 'Azza Wa-Jall (Milik-Nya Segala Keperkasaan Dan Keagungan) Datang Dan Memutuskan Perkara Di Antara Mereka. Kemudian Orang-Orang Beriman Diberi Ketenangan Dari Keadaan Tersebut Dan Diarahkan Ke Tujuan Yang Paling Diberkahi

"Dan pada sebagian malam (juga) laksanakanlah salah (shalat) dengan

itu (yakni bacalah Al-Qur'an dalam shalat), sebagai shalat tambahan

(Tahajjud shalat sunnah - Nawafil) bagimu (wahai Muhammad #8). Mudah-mudahan Rabbmu mengangkatmu ke Maqaman Mahmuda (suatu maqam yang terpuji dan mulia, yakni derajat tertinggi di Surga)." Jaabir ibn 'Abdullah 4 melaporkan bahwa Rasulullah #8 bersabda, "Barangsiapa mengucapkan setelah mendengar adzan (panggilan shalat), 'Ya Allah, Pemilik panggilan yang sempurna ini dan Pemilik shalat yang akan dikerjakan ini, berikanlah kepada Muhammad Al-Waseelah (suatu kedudukan di Surga) dan Al-Fadeelah (suatu derajat di atas seluruh makhluk) dan angkatlah ia ke maqam yang terpuji dan mulia, yang telah Engkau janjikan kepadanya. Sesungguhnya Engkau tidak pernah mengingkari janji-Mu,' maka syafaatku halal baginya pada Hari Kebangkitan." (Bukhaaree)

Syafaat Adalah Maqam Terpuji Dan Mulia

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi 2% bersabda, "'Mudah-mudahan Rabbmu mengangkatmu ke Maqaman Mahmuda (suatu maqam yang terpuji dan mulia)."" Beliau #8 bersabda, "Itulah syafaat." (Ahmad)

Rasulullah # diberi lima perkara yang tidak diberikan kepada Nabi atau

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 315

Rasul #% mana pun sebelumnya. Jaabir # — dan lainnya — meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah 2% bersabda, "Aku diberi lima (perkara) yang tidak diberikan kepada Nabi mana pun sebelumku: Aku dijadikan menang dengan rasa takut selama jarak satu bulan perjalanan (yakni mereka yang berjarak satu bulan perjalanan darinya, dalam hal musuh-musuhnya, merasa takut untuk berperang dengannya); ghanimah (harta rampasan perang) dihalalkan bagiku, padahal tidak dihalalkan bagi siapa pun sebelumku; bumi dijadikan sebagai masjid bagiku dan (dijadikan) suci (bagiku dan umatku), maka jika waktu shalat tiba bagi siapa pun dari umatku, hendaklah ia shalat (di mana pun ia berada); aku diberi syafaat; dan sementara seorang Nabi diutus kepada kaumnya, aku diutus kepada seluruh manusia." (Bukhaaree dan Muslim)

Ketika Nabi #% bersabda, "Aku diberi syafaat," beliau #€ merujuk kepada syafaat yang akan dimohonkan dari Adam, yang akan berkata, "Aku bukan orangnya untuk itu, pergilah kepada Nuh." Nuh akan mengatakan hal yang sama kepada mereka, dan akan mengarahkan mereka kepada Ibraaheem #4, yang akan merujuk mereka kepada Moosa, yang akan merujuk mereka kepada 'Eesa. Kemudian 'Eesa akan merujuk mereka kepada Muhammad #3, yang akan berkata, "Akulah orangnya, akulah orangnya." Kami akan membahas ini lebih rinci ketika kami meriwayatkan hadith-hadith tentang syafaat, syafaat bagi orang-orang berdosa untuk dikeluarkan dari Neraka.

Pada Hari Kebangkitan, Rasulullah 2 Akan Menjadi Pemimpin Anak Cucu Adam #21

Rasulullah # Adalah Imam Para Nabi Pada Hari Kebangkitan

At-Tufail ibn Abee Ka'ab meriwayatkan dari ayahnya # bahwa Nabi #8 bersabda, "Pada Hari Kebangkitan, aku akan menjadi Imam para

316 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

Nabi, Khateeb (orator) mereka, dan pemilik syafaat mereka — semua tanpa Fakhr (kesombongan atau keangkuhan)." (Ahmad) At-Tirmidhee dan Ibn Maajah keduanya meriwayatkannya dari 'Abdullah ibn Muhammad ibn 'Ugail. Dan At-Tirmidhee berkata, "Hasan sahih."'

An-Nadr ibn Anas meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi #¥ bersabda, "Aku akan berdiri, menunggu umatku setelah melewati Siraat. 'Eesa 2% akan datang kepadaku dan berkata, 'Ini adalah para Nabi yang telah datang kepadamu, wahai Muhammad; mereka harus memohon kepadamu,' atau beliau 2 bersabda, 'mereka akan berkumpul kepadamu. Mereka berdoa kepada Allah untuk memisahkan seluruh umat ke mana pun yang Allah kehendaki.' 'Makhluk-makhluk dibelenggu dalam keringat. Adapun orang beriman, keringat itu terasa seperti dingin padanya. Adapun orang kafir, kematian akan menyelimutinya di dalamnya.' Nabi #¢ kemudian berkata kepada 'Eesa, 'Tunggu hingga aku kembali kepadamu.' Beliau # kemudian pergi ke bawah 'Arsy. Beliau akan menemui sesuatu yang tidak pernah ditemui oleh malaikat mana pun yang terpilih, maupun Nabi yang diutus. Allah kemudian mengilhamkan kepada Jibreel untuk pergi kepada Muhammad dan berkata, 'Angkatlah kepalamu; mohonlah, kau akan diberi; bersyafaatlah, dan syafaatmu akan diterima.' Nabi #4 kemudian bersabda, 'Kemudian aku akan bersyafaat bagi umatku, dan aku akan
content_ar: أبو هريرة # related that he heard النبي ﷺ 2% say, “Whoever has camels for which he doesn’t give their due الحق in their الشدة and their اليسر, then they will come on the Day of البعث the most Aglzar they ever were, the most in number, the fattest they ever were, and the most Asar (providing happiness) they ever were (i.e. this all means they will be in very الخير shape). He will be thrown on his face on a level, smooth land, and they will trample him with their feet. عندما the last of them goes by him, the أولاً one will be brought back for him, on a day whose measurement is 50,000 years. This will continue حتى (الله) rules between the people. Then he will see his destination. And إذا he had cows for which he did not pay their due tight (ie. Zakaat) in their الشدة and اليسر, then they will come on the Day of البعث more fast and active than they ever were; bigger than ever قبل; fatter than ever قبل; more Asar (providing happiness) than ever قبل; more in number than ever قبل; and more Anshar than ever قبل. Then he will be thrown on his face on a level, smooth land. Every possessor of Dhilf (feet of a cow, sheep, or deer) will trample him and every possessor of a horn will butt him. عندما the last of them passes by him, the أولاً one will be brought back for him, on a day whose measurement is 50,000 years. This will continue حتى (الله) judges between the people, and then he will see his destination.” (أحمد) Al-Baihaqee said, “This can only mean that that Day is calculated to be 50,000 years from the years you count.” And الله 48 knows best. 312 الكتاب of The End: Great ‘الابتلاءات and Tribulations For Sinners, The Day Of البعث Is Long And Difficult; For The People Of التقوى (Piety, Righteousness, Etc.), It Is Neither Long Nor Difficult It will only be long and difficult for one who is not forgiven. أما those المؤمنون who are forgiven, Abu ‘Abdullah Al-Haafiz related that أبو هريرة said, “For the المؤمنون, the Day of البعث is like the period between Az-Zuhr and Al-‘Asr.” He then said, “This is what is memorized (ic. by the trustworthy ones).” The same has been related in a narration that is ascribed to النبي ﷺ i it is related by Abu ‘Abdullah Al-Haafidh through Ibn Al-Mubaarak. Ya'qoob ibn Sufyaan related that ‘Abdullah ibn ‘عمر ts said, “الرسول ﷺ of الله #8 recited this الآية: LA wey ay BAe or RGN لذا EN Oe “The Day عندما (all) mankind will stand قبل the Lord of the and the people of الجنة will take their day nap in الجنة). He then recited: “Then, thereafter, verily, their return is to the flaming fire of النار.” الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 313 Ibn Al-Mubaarak said, “This is the التلاوة of Ibn Mas’ood 4 for this الآية (في حين the well-known التلاوة is ‘Then thereafter, verily, their return is to the flaming fire of النار’).” (Related by أبو بكر ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa) Oo peehe SLE eb Be nye ae ae ot “The dwellers of الجنة (i.e. those who deserved it through their الإيمان and righteousness) will, on that Day, have the best abode, and have the fairest of places for repose,“"1l ‘Abdullah ibn Mas’ood 4 said, “Half of the day will not pass on the Day of البعث حتى both of these take their repose (people of النار in النار, people of الجنة in الجنة).” (Related by أبو بكر 314 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations THE STATION OF PRAISE AND GLORY Among The Rest Of The الأنبياء, Is Specific To الرسول ﷺ Of الله #%; Part Of That Is The Greater Intercession For The People Of The Mawgif, لذا That The Lord ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him Belongs Might And Majesty) Comes And Rules Between Them. Then The المؤمنون Are Given Comfort From That Situation And Are Headed To A Most Blessed Destination “And in some parts of the night (أيضاً) offer the الصلاة (الصلاة) with it (ie. recite the Qur’an in the الصلاة), as an additional الصلاة (Tahajjiud optional الصلاة - Naweafil) for you (O محمد ﷺ #8). It may be that your Lord will raise you to Magaman Mahmuda (a station of praise and glory, i.e. the highest degree in الجنة’), Jaabir ibn ‘Abdullah 4 reported that الرسول ﷺ of الله #8 said, “Whosoever says upon hearing the call (to الصلاة), ‘O الله, Owner of this perfect call and Owner of this الصلاة to be performed, bestow upon محمد ﷺ Al-Waseelah (a station in الجنة) and AlFadeelah (a rank above the rest of creation) and raise him upon a station of praise and glory, which You have promised him. Verily, You never fail in Your promise,’ then my intercession is permissible for him on the Day of البعث.” (Bukhaaree) The Intercession Is The Station Of Praise And Glory أبو هريرة # related that النبي ﷺ 2% said, “ ‘It may be that your Lord will raise you to Maqaman Mahmuda (a station of praise and glory).”” He #8 said, “The intercession.” (أحمد) الرسول ﷺ # was given five matters that no other النبي or الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 315 Messenger #% was given. Jaabir # — and others — related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “I have been given five (matters) that were not given to any النبي قبل me: I have been made victorious with terror for the distance of a month (i.e. those who are one month’s traveling distance from him, in terms of his enemies, are terrified to do battle with him); spoils of war have been made lawful for me, في حين they were not made lawful for anyone قبل me; the earth was made as a المسجد for me and (it was made) pure (for me and my nation), لذا إذا الصلاة arrives for any man from my Nation, then let him pray (wherever he happens to be); I have been given the intercession; and في حين a النبي would be sent to his people, I have been sent to the people in general.” (Bukhaaree and مسلم) عندما النبي ﷺ #% said, “I have been given the intercession,” he #€ was referring to the intercession that will be requested from آدم si, who will say, “I am not the one for that, go to نوح.” نوح, ss8\ will say the same to them, and will guide them to Tbraaheem #4, who will refer them to Moosa 3&!, who will refer them to ‘Eesa 8681. Then “Eesa #84 will refer them to محمد ﷺ #3, who will say, “I am for it, 1 am for it.” We will discuss this in more detail عندما we relate Ahaadeeth about intercession, intercession for the sinners to be taken out from the النار. On The Day Of البعث, الرسول ﷺ 2 Will Be The Chief Of The الأولاد Of آدم #21 الرسول ﷺ # Is The الإمام Of The الأنبياء On The Day Of البعث At-Tufail ibn Abee Ka’ab related from his الأب # that النبي ﷺ #8 said, “On the Day of البعث, I will be the الإمام of the 316 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations الأنبياء, their Khateeb (orator), and the possessor of their intercession — all without Fakhr (الكبر or haughtiness).” (أحمد) At-Tirmidhee and Ibn Maajah both related it from ‘Abdullah ibn محمد ﷺ ibn ‘Ugail. And At-Tirmidhee said, “حسن صحيح.”’ An-Nadr ibn أنس related that النبي ﷺ #¥ said, “I will be standing, waiting for my nation بعد the Siraat. ‘Eesa 2% will come to me and say, ‘These are the الأنبياء who have come to you, O محمد ﷺ; they have to ask you,” or he 2 said, ‘they will gather to you. They are supplicating to الله to separate between all of the nation to wherever الله wishes.’ “The creation is bridled in sweat. أما the المؤمن, it is wpon him like the cold. أما the disbeliever, الموت will envelop him in it.” النبي ﷺ #¢ will then say to “esa 4s, ‘Wait حتى I return to you.’ He # then goes to underneath the Throne. He will meet with that which no chosen angel ever met with, nor any sent النبي. الله will then inspire Jibreel to go to محمد ﷺ and say, ‘Raise your head; ask, you will be given; intercede, and your intercession will be accepted.” النبي ﷺ #4 then said, “Then I will intercede for my nation, and I will
